description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display dominating the front, featuring rounded corners and a vibrant, colorful wallpaper. The screen shows a digital clock, date, and several popular app icons such as Netflix, Pinterest, YouTube, Facebook, Messenger, and Spotify, suggesting a focus on multimedia and social connectivity. The back of the phone is matte black with a vertical multi-lens camera array and a small flash module positioned in the upper left corner, as well as a subtle 'mi' logo near the bottom. The sides of the phone are slim and appear to be constructed from a metallic or high-quality plastic frame, with no visible physical buttons or ports. The device is sleek and minimalistic, with a premium finish and a flat profile. Its overall design is consistent with high-end smartphones commonly seen in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a vibrant edge-to-edge display, matte black back, and a vertical multi-lens camera array. The front features colorful app icons and a digital clock, while the back is minimalistic with a subtle logo.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the phone's slim, flat edge with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_1: The front view displays a large, colorful screen with app icons, a digital clock, and rounded corners.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile, also slim and buttonless, mirroring the first side view.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a matte black surface, a vertical multi-lens camera array with flash in the upper left, and a 'mi' logo near the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: A small 'mi' logo is present near the bottom center of the back, rendered in a subtle, slightly lighter shade than the matte black surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful gradient wallpaper, a digital clock reading '12:10 SAT, NOV', and a row of popular app icons including Netflix, Pinterest, YouTube, Facebook, Messenger, and Spotify. There is also a small text at the bottom reading 'Youtube.com/1techkey'.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a vertical array of five camera lenses and a flash module located in the upper left corner on the back of the phone.
